IGUI_PhunSprinters_maxRisk_Tooltip: The maximum risk of sprinters appearing in this zone. Leave blank or 100 for 100%
IGUI_PhunSprinters_minRisk_Tooltip: The risk of sprinters appearing in this zone before being adjusted for character playtime or moon phase
IGUI_PhunSprinters_Moon_Reducing_Desc: The %1 has a soothing effect on zeds, reducing the amount of sprinters by %2%
IGUI_PhunSprinters_Moon_Normal_Desc: The %1 doesn't appear to have any effect on the number of sprinters gathering
IGUI_PhunSprinters_Moon_Increasing_Desc: The %1 is causing an increase sprinters by %2%
IGUI_PhunSprinters_X_Risk: The classification for %1 is %2 as %3% of zombies may sprint
IGUI_PhunSprinters_Too_Light_Desc: The brightness outdoors is soothing sprinters
IGUI_PhunSprinters_Too_Dark_Desc: The darkness outside is making sprinters restless
IGUI_PhunSprinters_ActiveMode3: Sprinters are restless due to the overall darkness
IGUI_PhunSprinters_InactiveMode3: Sprinters are soothed because of the overall brightness
IGUI_PhunSprinters_ActiveMode4: Sprinters are restless when in the dark
IGUI_PhunSprinters_InactiveMode4: Sprinters are soothed in the light
